title: Patient Identity
description: The canonical shape of a Patient record — docs/33-DOMAIN-MODEL.md §1.1 (Patient) and §1.2 (Patient Identity) combined into one stored record, per docs/29 §4's already-locked schema. See patient-identity.md for why these two conceptually distinct entities share one row instead of two, and which fields are the permanent identity core vs. the mutable profile.

patient_id.description: The permanent identity core (docs/33 §1.2, ADR-002). A UUID, generated once at creation, never reused or changed. Every other Phase 2A record references this value, never email or any other field on this object.

full_name.description: Profile field (docs/33 §1.1). Mutable — may change without affecting patient_id or any record that references it.

email.description: Profile field, and — per ADR-003 — the current authentication-lookup mechanism attached to this identity. Mutable. A future authentication method would attach to patient_id the same way, per ADR-002; this field is never itself treated as the identity.

condition_slug.description: Profile field. Reuses the canonical condition anchor IDs already locked by docs/20 §5 and reused throughout Phase 1.5 — not independently validated against that list yet in Foundation batch F3 (a documented simplification, see patient-identity.md).

status.description: Profile field (docs/33 §1.1's lifecycle). Set to "active" at creation.

created_at.description: Permanent — set once at creation, never modified afterward.

created_by.description: Permanent — the staff identifier who created this record, an audit provenance field, never modified afterward.
